entry.title: saving a report using 2 queries on the same table (with different filters) using a merged dimension
entry.content:
when closing and reopening it i've seen two different behaviors :

- either the merged dimensions are "lost" and thus the data appear as "#SYNCDATA" until I remerge the dimension allowing to identify the lines I want matched in both requests and reaffect it to the details that depend on it

- either (more disturbing) it auto associates all dimensions that have the same name in both request ( all of them actually ... resulting in keeping only the data that are strictly identical, definitely not what I want)

using SAP BusinessObjects - Web Intelligence (WebI) SAP BusinessObjects BI 4.3 Support Pack 4 Correctif 6 with the new web interface and I didn't have that problem with the previous "old UI" version.

Use case behind : I have in the same table a price, fields allowing me to identify a specific line, and a beginning and end of validity dates. I want to recover in the same table both the current and previous price ... it works well with the merged dimension on the fields allowing to identify a specific line, but if I save and replay the reports, the merged dimensions get lost or unappropriately associated.

Is there a setting I miss somewhere that impacts the way merged dimesions are saved or "auto calculated" when a report is opened ?

entry.title: Re: B2B Composable Storefront Demo - Logins?
entry.content: Just now I tried to register and then i am successfully be able to login to storefront.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - Creating XML Structure for Remote Function Call (RFC) that Requires Tables a
entry.content:
Hi Luis,
Thanks for the blog 
I'm trying to pass the the table as described but facing 500 Internal Server error.
Also when I'm not passing the OPTIONS Structure in the below body then it is giving 200 OK.

 

 

 

Body:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns1:ZRFC_AC_XXXXX xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
    <QUERY_TABLE>BSEG</QUERY_TABLE>
    <OPTIONS>
        <TEXT>DATE >= '20050607' AND DATE <= '20100617'</TEXT>
    <OPTIONS>
</ns1:ZRFC_AC_XXXXX>

How can we resolve this?

Best Regards
Shivam

entry.title: Re: Everything about using SAP Business Transformation center for SDT S/4 HANA Conversion 2023 from

Thanks for detailing the functionlities of SDT using BTC.  Please confirm if we can carry out selective data migration based on time filter as well along with company code selection.

entry.title: Re: Excel Download with hyperlinks
entry.content:
Thanks Sandra & Raymond for your time and effort to solve this problem... Your inputs were of great value for me to proceed.
I turned to a CSV format file and converted to xml via fm: SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING. Though it wont have the formats that was needed, but at least I could get the hyperlinks on the file.

Thanks much for Your perusal and help!

entry.title: Re: In Public cloud getting error while updating the Juri...
entry.content:
Thank you for quick reply Lucy  😊 , We have checked this Nots 3556496 , Which is not applicable for Public cloud. Could you pls provide us solution please. Getting error message while updating Jurisdiction code in Company code address  " Jurisdiction code 0800301000 is not defined USA" This issue we are facing HANA Public cloud system.

Thank you 

JP

entry.title: Unable to POST Workforce Timesheet using OData Service
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am working on a scenario where the requirement is to create timesheet of an employee in the SAP Public Cloud System. 

I referred to api.sap.com for the standard OData Service (https://api.sap.com/api/API_MANAGE_WORKFORCE_TIMESHEET/tryout)

As per the documentation i am posting this JSON payload : 

{
   "TimeSheetDataFields": {
      "ActivityType": "8",
      "WBSElement": "ADAPTIVE ROYALITY",
      "TimeSheetTaskType": "MISC",
      "TimeSheetNote": "THIS IS TEST NOTE",
      "RecordedHours": "9"
   },
   "TimeSheetDate": "2025-01-02T00:00:00",
   "TimeSheetIsReleasedOnSave": true
}

 But i am not able to see the response in Postman even if the response code is HTTP 200 OK

Please provide your valuable feedbacks. 


Best Regards, 
Prathmesh Sutar

entry.title: Sharing headers and exchange properties among parallel multicast branches in BTP IS (CPI)
entry.content:
Hello.

I have a scenario in which I need 2 branches from a parallel multicast, the first one have to control the execution time and the other executes the normal flow of the integration.

What I'm trying to accomplish doesn't work because each branch of the parallel multicast gets its own set of headers and exchange properties and modifying them in one branch doesn't take place in the other, also new headers and properties created in one branch are not present in the other. I don't know if this a bug or if it is intended, I guess my question is:

Is there a way to share headers and exchange properties among parallel multicast branches, without writing global variables or resorting to save data in data stores or JMS queues?

I tried changing the runtime configuration allowing headers and combining these allowed headers with all the possible options in HTTP Session Reuse, didn't work.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Consume External Rest API/Webservice Bydessing
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm hoping anyone is reading this.

Does anyone know a solution to this?

I am currently facing the same issue. Calling other resources on the same webservice with "POST" works and returns Result.Content but when using HTTPMethod GET it is always empty.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: B2B Integration Factory Q4/2024 Release highlights
entry.content:
Which requirements are crucial for your B2B business that you would like to see in the product?

Answer: Availability of OFTP2 Adapter capability.

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere is coming! Controlled release i
entry.content:
Hi @MBode 

there is a useful support note here https://me.sap.com/notes/3515100/E with a section that states: 

Prerequisites apply:

  1. SAP Analytics Cloud running on HANA Cloud
  2. SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere are located in the same data center. SAP datacenters are not in scope
  3. SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere use the same identity provider
  4. SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere tenants are linked for seamless planning in a 1:1 relationship by the system owner

As such, we're encouraging customers to deploy datasphere (via BTP) to the same datacentre as their SAC instance. 

regards, H

entry.title: Re: Drop down with fixed values for a column in SAP CAP
entry.content: Hi Neetesh, it's actually not related to the Smart controls of FE v2. Rather CAP handles the translation based on the language parameter / header UI5 sends with the request. You can check out https://pages.github.tools.sap/cap/docs/guides/i18n#user-locale where the language determination process of CAP is described. Applying that should automatically translate the name property of the entity without the need to manually expand the texts navigation property. Hope that helps & BR, Marten

entry.title: SuccessFactors Joule - Joule and EC Quick Actions
entry.content:
Joule in combination with Employee Central provides us a huge set of use cases where Joule can support your employees and managers to run EC related processes. [List of transaction use cases]

To get this use cases running it is important to implement EC Quick Actions for the available cases. [Guide]

 

Let me try to show how the configuration of EC Data Model, Quick Action and Joule comes together.

1. Business Configuration: Here you define the fields, rules etc. that are available for employee data in overall and what you can see/change on the employee profile

2. RBP based on Business Configuration: Here you define who can see, edit, change, delete, create what details of whom

3. Configure Quick Action: With the configuration of the quick action you define what fields (from the datamodel/business configuration) are necessary for a dedicated process (e.g. if you have defined a process for working time changes than you can define that standard weekly hours, number of days per week are relevant for the process). The selected template defines the set of the available fields

4. Permissions for Quick Actions: Here you define who can run what quick action for whom (typically it is foreseen for Managers and Employees but it is also possible for HR)

With this 4 configuration steps you are ready to run EC based scenarios on Joule.

 

 

How can you validate if you can run a quick action based scenario on joule?

Let us assume I'm logged in as Carla and I want to change my own working location.

What do I need: 

- an EC Employee Profile (with bio info, job info, person info)

- permissions to run the "change location" quick action for me

 

To check the permission open the profile of Carla and check the available actions.

Because the quick action is available on profile level we should be able to run the scenario in joule also.

 

How does joule knows what information needs to be provided?

Joule is running step by step through the quick action definition.

You have defined what fields are relevant for the quick action. So Joule will ask you for each and every defined field if you want to change or to keep. 

If all the defined fields are provided user will see a summary and can save the data. In case a workflow is defined the workflow get's triggered.

One special hint: On the Quick Action template you can define what event reason is written for the defined action. In case you are NOT using event reason derivation you have to define the event reason on quick action template level.

 

Let us have a look to an example where the scenario on joule would not work.

Here we (again as Carla) see an "empty" profile where we have only an user but no employee data (no employment, no job).

In this case the quick action would not be available in the profile (even if my logged-in user has quick action permissions).

And so Joule will answer with "it is not possible".

 

 

 

 

Typical "issues" during testing:

- Quick Actions not defined

- No permission to run the quick action for the selected user

- selected user has no EC data (most common issue during testing on non-prod systems)

entry.title: Updating Short text of Inspection Lot using BO Interface - I_INSPECTIONLOTTP_2 (EML/RAP)
entry.content:
Hallo,

Link to details of Business Object Interface I_INSPECTIONLOTTP_2 - https://api.sap.com/bointerface/PCE_I_INSPECTIONLOTTP_2 

I am trying to use this BO interface to update the short text of Inspection Lot

 

DATA: ls_update_mapped TYPE RESPONSE FOR MAPPED I_InspectionLotTP_2,
      ls_update_failed TYPE RESPONSE FOR FAILED I_InspectionLotTP_2,
      ls_update_reported TYPE RESPONSE FOR REPORTED I_InspectionLotTP_2.

      MODIFY ENTITIES OF I_InspectionLotTP_2
  ENTITY InspectionLot
    UPDATE FIELDS ( InspectionLotText )
    WITH VALUE #( (
    %key-inspectionlot = <fs_insplot>-prueflos
                    %data-InspectionLotText = lv_shorttext
                    %control-InspectionLotText = if_abap_behv=>mk-on ) )
    MAPPED ls_update_mapped
  FAILED ls_update_failed
  REPORTED ls_update_reported.

 

 

<fs_insplot>-prueflos has the inspection lot number and lv_shorttext has the new short text.

Problem faced is - ls_update_failed is always filled with error

CAUSE - UNSPECIFIC

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – A Simple Demo Scenario Using the JDBC Adapter
entry.content: thank you for the detail.I am trying to achieve the same functionality but i want to receive email after every operation is performed. ex: after creation of table, insertion, deletion etc. I want to achieve it in one integration flow

entry.title: Assistance Needed with Substitution for FI Component (Event 0005)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I encountered an issue while attempting to activate Cost of Sales (COS) accounting for a specific company. Below is the path I followed:

Path:
T.Code: SPRO > SAP Reference IMG > Financial Accounting > Financial Accounting Global Settings > Functional Area for Cost of Sales Accounting > Activate Cost of Sales Accounting

After selecting the desired company and marking "Active" in the COS column, I received the following message:
"Substitution for FI component, event 0005 not yet activated."

Could someone please clarify the following points:

  1. What is the "Substitution for FI component, event 0005"?
  2. In which scenarios is it used?
  3. How can I resolve this issue to proceed with activating COS accounting?

I’ve also attached an image for further clarification.

Best regards,
Mostafa Mahmoud

entry.title: Re: BADI J_1BNF_ADD_DATA - CHAMADA
entry.content:
Referente ao questionamento 1. 

SAP NOTE 2346434.

Ativando o fleg "Aut.Import.dds.adics" no local de negócio, automaticamente ao salvar a NF Writer ela irá acionar a BADI J_1BNF_ADD_DATA.

Att,

your screenshot is showing a Direct Live Connection which is different from a Tunnel Live Connection. that's it

entry.title: Re: Assistance Needed with Substitution for FI Component...
entry.content:
Read first Deriving the Functional Area

  • Financial Accounting
    Global Settings -> Company Code -> Cost of Sales Accounting -> Set Up
    Substitution for Cost of Sales Accounting ->Prepare Cost of Sales Accounting (can be found in error message long text 😉)

entry.title: Re: Rebates (Condition Contracts) Partial Settlements with individual business volume
entry.content:
Hi @gvictor,

That's true. If we go with the final settlement for the Q4, it will follow the consolidated business volume method.

Regards

Hari

entry.title: Re: ABAP LLM Client Beta Release
entry.content:
I don't have any insights into the SAP ABAP AI SDK functionality but I assume it will focus on easy integration with their AI services and therefore give you access to many features. From the roadmap entry it seems it is targeted at SAP BTP ABAP envrionment first and more on the role of a developer assistant.

The community ABAP LLM Client tries to make it easy to call LLMs from within ABAP starting with 7.52 and without ABAP Cloud version support, so basically typical on-prem or other self-hosted environments. Probably a good option if you don't fullfill the prerequisites to use the SAP ABAP AI SDK and want to get started with this topic. I assume that with everyone going cloud the community ABAP LLM Client will be less relevant long-term. But yeah ... S/4HANA was first released nearly 10 years ago so long-term might be really long 😉

entry.title: Strategy maintenance plan re-scheduling in multiple maintenance package scenario
entry.content:
Hello, 

If in preventive maintenance strategy plan has selected multiple different maintenance packages for example 1 year and 5 year.

And if there is only one time exception and need to postpone only that 1year maintenance package +6 month, in situation that order is not called. How to call and re-schedule that 1 year packet +6 month, but not make any changes for 5 year package and calls

What is the best model for preventive maintenance strategy plan and what options and best practicies there is? Multiple maintenance items?

entry.title: Re: Master Data and Configuration Relationships in SAP S/...
entry.content:
Here some of the important points for your considerations.,

Financial Accounting :

OX15 - Company  

OX02 - Edit, copy, delete, check company code 

OX03 - Business Area

Controlling :

OX06 - Maintain controlling Area

Logistics General :

OX14 - Valuation Level 

OX10 - Edit ,copy , delete check plant

OVXB - Def, copy, delete check division.

Material Management :

OX09 - Storage Location 

Ox08 - Purchase Organization

Enterprise structure Assignment :

Financial Accounting :

OX16 - Company code to company

OX19 - Company code to controlling Area

Logistics General :

OX18 - Plant to Company code

OMJT - Business Area to plant 

Material Management :

OX01 - Purchase Organization to Company code

OX17 - Purchase Organization to Plant

Basic settings - Material Types

OMS2 - Define Attributes for Material types

MMNR - Material number ranges for material types

Plant Parameters :

OM18 - Carryout overall maintain of plant parameters 

OMD0 -Define MRP Controllers

OME4 - create purchasing Groups

OME5 - Define source list requirement at plant level.

OMWM - Define Valuation control

OMSK - Valuation class

OMWB - Configure Automatic posting

OBYC - Configure Automatic postings - Account assignments

Cheers

BR,

Sriram R

entry.title: how to get the curren row select by double click in Control Table
entry.content:
code 

      DATA: ws_field TYPE string,
            ws_line  TYPE string,
            repl     TYPE string.

      GET CURSOR FIELD ws_field LINE ws_line.

READ TABLE your_internal_table ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<workarea>) INDEX ws_line.
IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
"implement your code...
endif.

Kind regards,

Sorina

entry.title: How can we recover the deleted webi report instances?
entry.content: How can we recover deleted Webi report instances? Is it possible to restore previous instances? All instances from last year have been deleted, and only the latest instance of the scheduled report is currently visible. We want to retrieve the deleted instances.

entry.content:
Great update, thanks. Long awaited feature.

How do you handle the user authentification in SAP DM for a shared terminal scenario? One named user is being logged in, all others are only using their badge numbers?

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One 10.0 FP2208: Connection to the database is lost; contact your system administra
entry.content: I had to set the sysadmin role for the db user in order for it to work.

entry.title: STO creation with Quality/Blocked stock type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to allow intra/intercompany stock transfer from quality stock type. I understand this feature is available in SPM as described in KBA-3390111 but , I came accross another consulting note -3390689 in which it is mentioned that this process will work without errors only of the stock in quality stock type is not linked to an inspection lot for non EWM managed storage location.

My client belong to F&B industry and there it is quite common to have stock moved with the SC network in quality stock type for below reasons:-
1. Quality results usually take time and for that period the stock cannot be stored in factory due to space constraints.

2. in the DC to stock will in quality stock type which ensures this stock is not delivered to customer also stock in quality stock type is considered as available in stock for Supply planning purpose. 

Have you encountered such requirement from your clients and if yes, how have you addressed them.

 

Thanks,

Vinit.

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM PPF Action read Condition record
entry.content: For any of the PPF actions tied to HU printing there should be one available already that will evaluate condition records and only initiate printing if the condition is met.

attaching screenshot for the same.

entry.title: Re: BADI J_1BNF_ADD_DATA - CHAMADA
entry.content: https://web.archive.org/web/20240116094840/https://blogs.sap.com/2015/02/12/utilizacao-de-ambas-as-badis-de-nf-e-j1bnfadddata-e-clnfeprint/

entry.title: Empty content in RESTCallResult for GET when using ExecuteRESTService
entry.content:
We have used several times

ExecuteRESTService and ExecuteRESTServiceWithoutEncoding. So far the RequestMethod had always been "POST" and everything worked fine. The body of the Response was always included in the returned RESTCallResult.content structure.

Now I want to add another call with one of the above methods in an absl script, but now the result is not returning any content in the absl file.

When calling the REST Service in Postman, everything works fine and I am sure that the webservice is returning the xml structure.

What I am missing here? What would be the correct way to get xml content from a GET REST Webservice if this is not the correct script method?

entry.title: Re: New B2B electronic invoicing law in Germany: What you need to know
entry.content:
Hi Sanjay_Sota,

the implementation timeline can vary depending on the system complexity, customizations, and the existing setup. On average, it may take around three month, but some companies complete it much faster, while other may take longer.

Best regards,

Monika

entry.title: (Re)using Master Operations in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Introduction

By design, SAP Digital Manufacturing will always create order-specific objects like Operations, Routings and BOMs for every single new order downloaded from ERP. During this process, some fields are copied from master objects to the order-specific ones, see Enrichment of Order-Specific Objects for more details.

In this blog post, I will show you how to leverage "Operation (SAP ME)" and "Version" fields in the ERP Routing to create reusable master operation objects on the fly.

Standard Behavior

Out of the box, new order-specific objects are created for every single new order downloaded from ERP, like order-specific BOM and Routing:

And order-specific Operations:

 

As described at Enrichment of Order-Specific Objects, changes done locally in SAP Digital Manufacturing to master objects like Work Instruction and Data Collection assignments and other flags at BOM and Routing/Recipe levels are copied over and inherited from master to the newly created order-specific objects.

(Re)using Master Operations

As described in Routing Integration, "Operation activity master records can be created based on the SAP ME Operation and Version fields on the Operation record in the routing configuration.", which means that, at Routing level in ERP, "Operation (SAP ME)" and "Version" fields can be used to create and define master operations in SAP Digital Manufacturing.

 

Once defined in the routing, these fields are copied over to the production order in ERP.

And during Order Download process to SAP Digital Manufacturing, master operation objects are automatically created on the fly and reflect all over, see the examples below.

As master operations are now created and (re)used, you can perform settings and assignments directly against the master operations, like:

1 - Set 'Resource Type' directly at Master Operation level

2 - Assign other objects directly to the Master Operation, like Work Instructions, Data Collections, Buyoffs and etc

* As a remark, keep in mind that changes in Master Operations will affect every single orders using them.

Conclusion

Leveraging standard ERP fields and out of the box integrations, you can create and (re)use master operation activities in SAP Digital Manufacturing and perform settings and assignments against them.

 

Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Change the IAS tenant integrated with Learning
entry.content:
We have an IAS tenant integrated with two Learning instances and the goal is to change one of the connected SF and Learning pairs to a different IAS instance.

According to offical SAP sources (3447162 - Change the IAS tenant integrated with Learning - Learning&IAS pairing - SAP for Me) it is not possible to re-run the IAS Upgrade for Learning but I am wondering if there is a workaround or a way to achieve this by manually performing the configuration (create IAS applications ,define endpoints, etc.)

Thanks for any help or ideas.

Kind Regards,

Andreas

entry.title: Re: When i save TEST script error shown "Test objects cannot be created in foreign namespaces&q
entry.content: Prefix your object name with Y or Z for instance (R3TR ECAT ZREMOVE_TCODE_FROM_ROLES). Don't use names of the SAP namespace.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Keystore Expiry - Email Notification - Simplest of All
entry.content:
Hi chinmay,

Which roles are needed to get the keystore data? 

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: how to get the curren row select by double click in Control Table
entry.content: I guess you're talking about a Table Control (CONTROLS contrl TYPE TABLEVIEW USING SCREEN <screen no>.) When you double click in a field of the line, the cursor goes on the field and so GET CURSOR is fine. Please explain what your issue is.

entry.title: Re: Goods receiving hours are not considered
entry.content: Delivery date in sales order will be calculated based on the Factory Calander ID and It adds Transit Time and Transport Lead time to it

entry.title: Re: Assistance Needed with Substitution for FI Component...
entry.content: Thanks for your help Bro 🙏

entry.title: Re: Process order with DLV status are not settled
entry.content: Hi @Saif_Ali_Sabri the order settlement does not execute till we have DLV or TECO status set for the process order. In my case both these statuses were absent when the order was settled. As per your details I came to know that system can still considered the order if it don't have the DLV or TECO active which I don't feel true. There might be different possibility of considering this order for settlement.

entry.title: System error: order operation with invalid number
entry.content:
When we try to post a usage decision in QM (Accept) we get System error: order operation with invalid internal number. 

Incorrect posting to unresticted stock.

Any ideas what this could be?

entry.title: Re: Change new formulation new tax base
entry.content: It depends on how your current SD pricing procedure is configured and with that what change you expect from SD point of view.

entry.title: OData API query in SuccessFactors Object RowID visibility
entry.content:
Is it possible to expose the rowID found on an Object Definition to OData API / Reporting ?

For example, with the Position Object Definition, rowID (id) is detailed, but is not visible via an API call.  Can it be amended?

Any thoughts on this would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Unable to locate module rimraf via resolve logic: Cannot find module 'rimraf/package.json' from
entry.content:
• Delete node_modules directory.
  • Open Application Info screen
  • Press on link "Run 'npm install' in terminal'".

entry.title: Modification of External user home page Workzone advance
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

i am facing some issue with Workzone advance, where there is no option to modify Home page for external user, and news feed updates published on home page from internal user are also not appearing  for external users ,can you please suggest what is missing here?

SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition 

Thanks,

Siddharth

entry.title: Re: Not able to add metadata to .rh file
entry.content: Hi, The visuals including any meta data are generated through SAP Visual Enterprise Generator as part of the typical check-in procedure from a CAD authoring tool into SAP DMS, through the SAP Engineering Control Center plug-in in the respective CAD tool.

entry.title: Re: Add mappings is not working in SAP HANA Cloud Instance
entry.content: Still the same issue.

entry.title: Re: CAP App not working in BTP Cockpit
entry.content: Hi sakthivel

entry.title: Extensibility Overview SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 is used by different customers in different industries. While there are many features available as part of the standard software, there are still topics, which are very specific and won't be included. To ensure customers can tailor their tenants to their processes SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 offers many customization and extensibility capabilities. While customization can be done by experienced business users, extensibility offers extension points for experienced developers.

Extensibility Pattern

As we can't predict the different use-cases our customers are building, we focus on a set of six extension patterns. Those patterns are offering extension points, which can be used by developers to include their specific scenario.

With SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 there is no PDI development available any more. For that reason it is important to prepare for potential side-by-side development scenarios. To ensure a effective project, it is recommended to sort out the specific requirements of the different extension patterns already in the architecture phase of the project. That way it is possible to do strategic decisions and align the side-by-side architecture with the application development strategy of the company.

Technical Foundation

With SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 we decided to rely on open web standards only. All described extension pattern are based on three interfaces.

  •  Event Notifcation / API Hooks: In specific situations, SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 is calling http services (webhooks). This can be either synchron or asynchron.
  • REST-API: SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 is developed API first. That way all objects in the system can be read / modified via API. The officially supported API is documented on api.sap.com.
  • Mashups are based on iFrames to ensure a true separation of concerns. Using standard HTML and JavaScript it is possible to extend SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 technology independent.

 

Server Side Pattern

Server Side Patterns are Pattern (No. 1, 2, 5 and 6) without a UI integration. They are events, webhooks and external jobs. Synchronous Webhooks are used to intercept write request to SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 and modify them before they are persisted. They give a lot of flexibility to automate and validate the user input. At the same time, they are adding to the response time as the call can't return before the webhook is finished. Asynchronous Webhooks are executed after the request is finished. They don't have a performance or stability impact on the system as they are not directly involved in the processing of a request. 

Further reading:

  • Webhooks in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 

UI Extensions

UI Extensions are Mashups. We support two types of Mashups. Simple IFrames and Web Components. UI Extensions can be build using pro-code tools like SAP CAP or Low-Code / No-Code tools like SAP Build Apps. Especially SAP Build is a interesting offer for people used to do PDI Development, who don't like to pick up classic cloud native development, as it simplifies the start.

The communication with SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 is handled in general via APIs. To ensure a seamless integration, SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 listens to UI Events for client side communication. To match the look and feel of SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2, we use the Fiori Horizon Theme.

Further Reading:

  • Pro-code UI Extension in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2
  • Extend SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 with SAP Build Apps
  • Using UI Events in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2
  • Calling SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 APIs from SAP Build Apps
  • Fiori Theme
  • Fundamentals UI
  • SAP UI 5

Summary

Since the release of SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 we can see many custom extensions. The Extension pattern are helping during the project setup and development. In discussions with different partners and customers, we receive the feedback that side-by-side extensions are a valuable concept, which offers a lot flexibility. Some customers reported, they are using the same UI extension in different contexts. E.g. in SAP S/4 and SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 at the same time. This adds a lot value and safes cost, as the tool needs to be implemented once. Others see the benefit in side-by-side development, as they can assign their development experts more flexible as the technical foundation is the same, for standard microservice development and side-by-side extensibility in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2.

entry.title: Re: CAP App not working in BTP Cockpit

Hi sakthivel....
Did u resolved the issue? if so please share the solution, I am also facing the same issue

entry.title: Re: Universal Allocation in SAP S/4HANA 2022
entry.content:
Hi Daigo,

@daigo_imai 

you wrote: An important note to make is that Universal Allocation is not initially designed for activity allocations nor different types of settlements like for IO and WBS elements.

It seems that Universal Allocation does not support KSC1-KSC9 (Indirect Activity Allocation). Are there any plans to enhance Universal Allocation in the future?

While OnPrem Customers can still use these old transactions in S/4, what about Cloud Customers?

 

Thank you.

Kind regards

David

entry.title: Re: EWM-Fiori Apps
entry.content:
@Narasimha  

   Your poster is wonderful, but could you tell me how I can identify whether a Fiori app is active for the basic or advanced EWM version?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Calling SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 APIs from SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
In the previous post, we created a application to generate vouchers as a compensation for our customers. In this post we like to further improve the application. To reduce the work of the call center agents, we like to store the voucher inside a extension field. That way, we can automatically send mails if a voucher is created.

In this Blog Post, we will extend the voucher app with API Calls to the SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 backend using SAP Build Apps.

Disclaimer

In this post, we are using functionality which is not released for general consumption. As long as functionality is not released SAP might decide to change or cancel the functionality. Please check the official roadmap for any forward looking information.

Setup SAP Build Apps

To use the SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 API in context of SAP Build the API needs to be exposed as a destination in BTP. The setup is described on help.sap.com.

 

After the Destination is imported into the SAP BTP Account, we can use it to further improve the app developed in SAP Build.

Setup Integration

In SAP Build we open the previously develop UI application. Now we can install a new integration. In the Integration tab, we click "Add Integration". We like to add a SAP System, where we can select the previously created destination. After we installed the destination, we can enable the Case Entity. 

    

That way, we can communicate with the case object, like we did before with the voucher backend e.g. via data variables.

Save Voucher Code and Value

We extended the case object with two custom fields (voucher_amount and voucher_code). 

In SAP Build we need to extend the submit function to also store the amount and code inside the case. We add a "Update record" node after we stored the voucher in the database. We select "sap.crm.caseservice.api.case" as resource. The Object ID is the caseID we retrieved as a page parameter. For the record, we just need to adjust the fields we like to update. In our case voucher_code and voucher_amount. The values are linked to the output of the previous node.

 

Custom Events (preview)

SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 is not locking objects. To ensure, updates are always done on the latest version of an object, it is using the If-Match header. As we are updating the case in the mashup, the core application is on a old version of the case. If we are not forcing SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 to refresh the object the users would get a "The object has changed in a parallel session" error on his next update to the case.

Currently the development team is working on a feature to refresh data using UI Events. To use it we need to raise a custom event using the JavaScript Node.

In the JavaScript Node we include the following code:

 

 

var customEvent = { event: "customRefreshEvent", params: {  } }
self.window.parent.postMessage(customEvent, '');*
return { result: true };

 

 

In the mashup configuration it will be possible to configure the custom event, which can be mapped to the object refresh in the case screen during adaptation of the mashup.

During the Mashup Placement, we can map the custom event to the case refresh.

 

With the currently developed custom event feature, changes to the same object will be possible without any interruption due to parallel session errors.

Final Touch

As the voucher information is now part of the case information, we can create a Autoflow wich is automatically informing the customer about it. Also the information is now available in other parts of the application e.g. determination / validation.

Summary

In the blog post we extended the previously created Voucher app. We added SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 as a resource to the SAP Build App. That way, we can simply exchange data between SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 and SAP Build. At the end we took a quick look at the currently developed custom event capability to force a refresh of the current case in the SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 UI.

Due to the deep integration of SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 and SAP Build Apps it is possible to build also complex use-cases with a few clicks. By combining different capabilities (e.g. SAP Build with in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 native capabilities), the effort to build custom extensions can be further reduced.

Resources

  • Extend SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 with SAP Build Apps
  • Pro-Code UI Extensions
  • Mashup Documentation
  • Extensibility using SAP Build Apps
  • UI Events
  • Custom UI Events

entry.title: Using UI Events in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
A key concept for UI extension in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 are UI Events. The Events are providing a capability to communicate between a extension running as mashup (iFrame) and the SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 UI. Compared to deep-links, UI Events have the benefit, that they are not opening a new window or browser tab. Instead it is possible to open e.g. Quick Create or Detail Views directly inside the SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 UI.

In this Blog post, we will discuss the basic concept of UI events and highlight a view special events.

Technical Foundation

UI Events are based on the window.postMessage() method. The Method allows the secure communication between frames. As the messages are processed inside the browser no network communication or server is involved. In SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 UI events are following a standardized protocol.

 

 

{
  operation:"navigation", 
  params: {
    objectKey: "00163ea6-f284-1eda-b895-42c904e08752", 
    routingKey: "ticket", 
    viewType:"details"
  }
}

 

 

operation: Type of action, which is triggered by the event.

params: Parameter as input to the operation 

Details of the protocol can be found on help.sap.com.

UI Events for Navigation

The most common UI Events are used for navigation tasks. A navigation events requires at least a routingKey and a viewType in the parameter section of the event. If a specific object is targeted, the objectKey is also required.

 

// Open Case List View
function openNewCnsCaseList() {
	var oCase = {operation: "navigation", params: {routingKey: "case", viewType: "list"}};
	window.parent.postMessage(oCase, '*')
}

// Open specific Case
function openNewCnsCaseViewWithRoutingKey() {
	var oCase = {operation: "navigation", params: {objectKey: "071cd754-bbb5-11ef-81f0-7540f83919fa", routingKey: "case"}};
	window.parent.postMessage(oCase, '*')
}

// Open Case Quick Create view
function openNewCnsCaseCreate() {
  	var oCase={operation:"navigation", params: {routingKey: "case", viewType:"quickcreate"}};
	self.window.parent.postMessage(oCase, '*')
}

 

Special Events

Beside navigation events, other use-cases are currently developed. One scenario, which is already is available are search events in Agent Desktop. Use-case for this scenario is a mashup placed in Agent Desktop. At certain events the mashup should trigger automatically a search and open the related account or individual customer.

 

function triggerSearchEvent() {
   var event = {event: "mashup100.magiccom.customExtendedSearch", operation: "search", params: {$search: "alex"}};
	window.parent.postMessage(event, '*')
}

 

The code above, will place search term "Alex" in the search field of Agent Desktop and if only one object is found open it immediately. 

 

A new feature currently under development are custom UI Events. The custom events can be mapped to certain actions, like UI Refresh during the placement of the mashup. Details are described in our sample-project.

Summary

UI Events are providing a great way to deeply integrate mashups with SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2. Due to the use of standard browser capabilities compatibility across browsers is ensured. Also no specific client libraries are required. Looking at existing customer projects, we can see the technology is used in many projects and it is amazing, what scenarios are build. If you have build a custom extension, we are keen to get to know about it. 

Resources

  • Pro-Code Extensions with Mashups
  • SAP Build UI Extension
  • Mashup Callback Documentation
  • window.postMessage() Reference
  • Sample Code

entry.title: Extend SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 with SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
SAP Build Apps is providing a simple way to create business applications without coding (No-Code / Lo-Code). Applications developed with SAP Build Apps can be embedded in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 as a mashup. This provides a easy to use capability to extend SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 without cloud native coding skills.

In this blog-post, we will create and integrate a SAP Build Apps application into SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2.

Technical Foundation

Technically SAP Build Apps are HTML / JavaScript Webpages, which can be simply integrated as a Mashup. For Details on Mashups, please checkout my blog-post about pro-code extensions of SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2.

SAP Build Apps Extension Architecture

Like in the pro-code example, we are using the same Identity Provider for the end-user authentication in SAP Build Apps as for SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2. That way, we can provide a seamless user-experience without an additional login step. For calls to the backend, we will use the Destination service, which is taking care of authentication and authorization towards SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2.

Voucher Use-Case

We are running a cinema company, which is running a service hotline, which is not only responding to service requests coming via phone, but also to requests coming via mail or social media. If customers are facing challenges, we are providing vouchers for their next visit. Recently we figured out, that there is a group of customers who are reaching out, just to receive free vouchers without experiencing any trouble. To separate those customers from customers with real problems, we like to memorize all vouchers provided to the customers.

In the further sections, we will create a basic app, to store vouchers and add more functionality as we go.

Persistence and Forms

In the first step we will create the basic functionality. We will create a data backend to store the voucher and a SAP Build Apps UI to interact with the data storage. 

For the Backend we are using the SAP Build Apps Application Backend. It allows us to store simple objects on a server. For many use-cases, this storage option is easy to setup and sufficient.

 

The Frontend is build with SAP Build Apps and deployed to Cloud Foundry.

 

After the App is created we will deploy it to SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Runtime and integrate it via mashup in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2. 

UI Events

Our users shared positive feedback about the voucher creation app. To improve the workflow, they asked for an option to directly open the account details from within the voucher app. They are frequently facing the situation, where they would like to retrieve some context information about the account before generating the voucher.

This can be achieved using UI Events via the JavaScript window.postMessage() functionality. For the extension, we add a button at the bottom of the screen. On the button tab event, we execute the following JavaScript code.

 

 

var account = {
  operation:"navigation", 
  params: {
    objectKey: inputs.accountID, 
    routingKey: "account", 
    viewType:"details"
  }
};
self.window.parent.postMessage(account, '*');
return;

 

 

The navigation event contains the ObjectKey (in this case the Account ID), the routing key (refers to the app, which should be opened) and the view type (in this case "details", other options are "list" or "quick create").

By sending the event to the parent window, SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 can pick up the event and open the according window in the same browser window.

 

Summary

SAP Build Apps is a very powerful extension mechanism for SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2. With the integrated backend logic, it is possible to build simple business extensions without dedicated cloud native development knowledge. Nevertheless, for SAP Build is a basic understanding of software development required. This makes it a good tool for e.g. former PDI developers who are not yet experienced in pro-code cloud development. For more complex use-cases there is still the possibility to build extensions using e.g. the SAP Cloud Application Programing Framework or a combination of both.

Resources

  • Mashup Documentation
  • SAP Build Apps learning
  • Pro-Code UI Extensions

entry.title: Re: How to configure alerts for inbound and outbound queues

entry.title: Re: In-House Repair in S/4HANA Service - Start with an Overview
entry.content:
Hello, 

Is it possible, to create outbound delivery directly from a repair order, without creating a return order? i.e. We would like to use this in-house process to refurbish an item from unrestricted use stock. Once refurbishment (repair order) is completed, the refurbed material should be sent to the customer.

Regards, 

Siriphen

entry.title: Re: saving a report using 2 queries on the same table (wi...
entry.content: Check for the Auto-merge dimension Data Options setting in your Webi document.  Make sure it is turned OFF.  This might resolve the issue.

entry.title: Re: CCO Coupon cannot remove after add more items. Cancellation even not possible .
entry.content:
Dear @Tharindu , 

If the problem persists, I would recommend to contact support.

Regards,

Maya

entry.title: Re: How can we recover the deleted webi report instances?
entry.content:
At a minimum, you will need at least one of the following:

  • A .lcmbiar file backup containing the report's instances
  • A file system backup of the Output FRS

If you have neither of the above, then you are out of luck - the instances are gone.

If you have an .lcmbiar backup, then you can easily import it back in, and your instances will be there.

If you have a file system backup (from prior to the deletion), then recovery may be possible, but it will be a lot of work.

  • If you also have a backup of the CMS from around the same time, then your chances of success are better.  If you can afford to lose all of the work that's been done in your BO environment since the instances were deleted, then you can simply recover everything (the CMS and FRS).  Your deleted instances should be there.  You're essentially turning back the clock to that point in time.
  • If you have a backup of the CMS but don't want to lose work that's been done since then, then it's possible but it's a lot of work and very risky.  You would need to install BO on a new server, and point it at a recovered instance of the CMS, and a recovered copy of the FRS.  If you have a clustered environment, then this does risk impacting your production cluster (I've done it, but in a very controlled environment).  Once the temporary environment is up, you can create an .lcmbiar file of the report and its instances, and migrate it to the production environment.
  • If you have a backup of the FRS but don't want to muck around with the CMS, you can try to find the actual .wid files for each instance in the FRS backup.  You then open the .wid files with WebI Rich Client, re-name them, and publish them to the CMS.  Note that each of these will be a base report - not an instance.  Since you're not touching the CMS, this method does not risk corrupting your production cluster.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Hana DB: Feature not supported on this instance
entry.content: I also have the same error

entry.title: Re: Having SWIFT code mandatory in SLP
entry.content:
Hello Diana,

It's been a while since we tackled this issue. We were not able to make the SWITFT code mandatory but we did not need it in the end as we were able to derive the SWIFT code from a table in the ERP.

Kind regards,

Louis

entry.title: Re: Last 10 SAP Activate 1 Minute Video's
entry.content: same remark

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One API Authentication Service is continuously restarting
entry.content:
Dear @ErenKaya,

If the problem persists, try checking the Keyclock’s log file in:

Win: C:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One SetupFiles\keycloak\standalone\log\

Linux: /usr/sap/SAPBusinessOne/Common/keycloak/standalone/log/

Regards,

Maya

entry.title: I am not able to assign Charactestics to a Combination in "Manage Characteristic Combinations" app
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently trying to create a Characteristic Combination in order to later on use it in BPS but I am facing an issue.

In the app "Manage Characteristic Combinations",  I have been able to create a new combination for Catalog Type "Base (Sales Document)". When I try to assign Characteristics, I am able to see the tree and to select the ones I want to include but when I click in "Assign" nothing happens and it remains blank. 

I have checked in SU53 but there is no error showing neither so I am not sure if the problem is related to my role (shouldn't be since I do have access to the fiori app) or what could be the problem. 

Any idea?

 

Thankssss!

entry.title: Re: saving a report using 2 queries on the same table (wi...
entry.content: **bleep**, who the hell thought it could be a good idea to automerge those and worse, by default .... thanks a lot, it fixes it !

entry.title: Re: Comparison of SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (SAC edition) vs. SAC add-in for Microsoft Excel
entry.content:
@SteffenHeine 

Dear Steffen,

I am working on a proposal for making a report. From your blog I was drawn to the following paragraph:

Quote

To enhance flexibility and customization, both add-ins support formula mode, allowing for highly adaptable and formatted reports beyond the traditional table-based layout. Furthermore, they enable data write-back formulas to planning-enabled data sources.

Unquote

We want to propose a report beyond the traditional table layout using f.e. subsections with seperate inline headers.

How can I get an impression about the extend to which form freedom is possible with the mentioned "formula mode"?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: External Instructor in SuccessFactors Learning
entry.content: Hi rconesa, Do you have any update about this topic?

entry.title: Re: External Instructors in LMS
entry.content: Hello! I have the same questio, do you have any advance on this topic?

entry.title: Access to APIProxy oData endpoint
entry.content:
0

I have installed the API Proxy packaged on my trail (on us10) instance of SAP Integration suite.

https://api.sap.com/api/APIPortal_APIProxy_CF/overview

It is a proxy to:

https://us10apiportal.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/apiportal/api/1.0/Management.svc

According to the documentation this backend system use oAuth2

But how do this work?

Does it have its own authentication server or do I create one in either SAP BTP Cockpit or as a proxy in the SAP Integration Suite?

If is has it's own, what is my client/secret? If I have to create a auth server myself - how is that linked to the backend system or is it all passed in the token?

I have not been able to find a step be step guide on this.

I'll be pleased if someone can help me on this one.

entry.title: FY variant under DRC (bi-monthly reporting)
entry.content:
Hi all, Business scenario: Company is reporting on bi-monthly basis e.g. January 25, February 25 (two months) will be reported in April 2025, 

March 2025, April 2025 (two months) will be reported in June 2025

May 2025, June 2025 will be reported in August 2025

July 2025, August 2025 will be reported in October 2025 ...

Which option from FY variant has to be chosen pls. to meet the Customer needs. 

When I am reviewing SAP Help Portal this option is not stated here. 

Thanks a lot. Milos

entry.title: Re: Engineer-to-Order Production with Variant Configurati...
entry.content: Hi Enda,

entry.title: Re: Having SWIFT code mandatory in SLP
entry.content: HCurrently in my company, if they do not indicate tello Luis, he SWIFT and only the bank key, you have to look for the SWIF key outside of ERP (online) and then enter it by hand. How have you done it in this case, with what ERP table was it? If you could tell me, I would be very grateful. Thank you very much in advance. Kind regards. Diana

entry.title: Add new Column in ME31K/ME32K Items -> Service Specifications (screen 400 of program SAPLMLSP)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have an requirement to add new column in ME31K/ME32K -> Items -> Service Specifications table control.

How to use existing customer ESLL - fields USERF1_TXT, USERF2_TXT for this purpose?

if not possible then is there any other way other to add new column other than selecting  item ->Details', then to chose tab 'Other' on the of screen 0400 of program SAPLMLSP.

Anyone have an idea?

Thanks,

Arpita

entry.title: Re: Engineer-to-Order Production with Variant Configurati...
entry.content: Hi Enda, thanks for the help but in process flow diagram not showing in the configurable modular and sales representee please check in image .

entry.title: Re: How can we recover the deleted webi report instances?
entry.content: Thank you so much for your inputs. I'll check and try out this. Really appreciate your prompt response.

entry.title: Re: RAP - Error on validation message highlight
entry.content:
Thank you, that worked for me!
I added this to my reported structure. (measure is my key)

%path-measure-%is_draft = if_abap_behv=>mk-on

entry.title: Re: New AWS option for SAP ODP data extraction through AWS Glue
entry.content:
@MarioDeFelipe Thanks for sharing this content with us.

Some companies, for security reasons, do not allow public connections into their instance URL; in other words, their OData services are not publicly accessible.

On Amazon AppFlow, we can address this requirement by creating a Private Link and assigning it on the SAP OData connection.

However, I did not find a similar option on AWS Glue. Do you know any workaround for this lack of option?

entry.title: SAC Live Connection Report is failed to refresh
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created a story based on top of SAC live connection model and story is displaying with blank when we open and tried at query designer for the same combinations, and it is failing due to memory issue. is there any specific setting to increase/update for memory? Attached the error screenshot for the same.

 



Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Having SWIFT code mandatory in SLP
entry.content: The table in SAP with the SWIFT codes is BNKA. The right SWIFT code is derived via the IBAN.

entry.title: Can we upload a docker compose file to BTP Cloud Foundry?
entry.content:
I want to deploy a Chatbot application to Cloud Foundry of BTP. I have this application in a docker-compose.yml file which has five different services mentioned and all services are dependednt on each other. Basically, it creates five different container in Docker which eventually makes an application run on a defined port. 

I would like to know if there is any possibility to deploy the application with Docker compose file?

Also let me know, if there is any other way to deploy such application. 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Analytical Insights in Joule (powered by SAP Analytics Cloud), Controlled release in Q1 2025
entry.content: @pianistprogrammer I do not have access to this document. It is maybe SAP Internal.

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87012218 - Credit Master Sheet fields
entry.content: Raymond this is great, thanks a lot. I received what I seek. As side question may I ask you something about VMK4, when I generate the report I see that some items do not have purchase order no. I am not sure what it means technically for the process, in reality I understand this says that this item is still at early stages.

entry.title: Is it possible (by rescaling) to avoid section weight to calculate the overall score?
entry.content:
Hi all, 

It's not possible to avoid using section weights to calculate the overall score as it's required for overall rating in the summary section of the PM form. However, is there a technique/workaround (maybe rescaling?) to avoid using the section weights to calculate the overall score? 

Desired scenario: if an objective with item weight has 20%, it should also be accounted for 20% in the overall score (and thus not being rescaled by the section weight first). 

Thanks! 

Kind regards, 

Ellen
